metadata.description: Chef Life Media ClaudeOS shared skills.

plugins.name: claudeos-handoff
plugins.description: ClaudeOS Handoff - end-of-session handoff for cold-start continuity. Auto-surfaces the nearest HANDOFF.md into cold/resumed sessions and backs up the transcript before compaction (Claude Code + Cowork), and regenerates a per-project HANDOFF.md via /handoff: reconcile docs, wiring map, memory sync, and PROPOSE-only cleanup.
